artifacts.description: Phase 6 objective tracking with approaches tried
Detailed handoff with analysis and next actions

partial_progress.details: Analyzed 13 sorries across DensityFrameCondition.lean and CantorApplication.lean. Identified root cause: direct case analysis uses exfalso in non-contradictory cases. Solution requires Pattern C iteration with seriality escape. Handoff written with detailed guidance.

completion_data.completion_summary: Analyzed Phase 6 strict density sorries. Found current proof structure uses exfalso in non-contradictory cases. Pattern C iteration with seriality escape is required. Created detailed handoff for successor.
